corrections.note: Middle point after ἐπάνω is present in the print.
The following καὶ is present at the start of the next clause and omitted in transcription at this point.
Middle point after καιρόν is visible.
The apparatus entry for verse 6 is omitted entirely; printed text has '6 ÷ και ο καθαρισμος (-÷.87) τουτων 87 Syr'.

corrections.correct: Danηλ κατα τους οʼ· εγγραφη εξ αντιγραφου.ἱεχοντος

notes: Body line numbers 87 and inline verse numerals are correctly present as transcripted page features. Main issues are a missing apparatus entry for v. 6 and omitted sigla in apparatus.
